message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant MobileApp
participant Apollo
participant Storage
participant Ironclad
participant Onfido

MobileApp -> Apollo : Any proof of XYZ or document related call that could result in a call to Onfido
Apollo -> Storage : GetLocalApplicant(sub)

alt [when the user was previously provisioned as an onfido applicant]
    Storage --> Apollo : Applicant { Id = sub; ApplicantId = OnfidoApplicantId; }
else [when the user was not previously provisioned]
    Storage --> Apollo : null
    Apollo -> Ironclad : GetUserInfo(sub)
    Ironclad --> Apollo : Claims[] { ... }
    Apollo -> Onfido : POST https://api.onfido.com/v2/applicants
    Onfido --> Apollo : 200 Applicant { Id = applicantId; [...]}
    Apollo --> Storage : Applicant { Id = sub, ApplicantId = onfidoApplicantId}
end

@enduml
```
